name: Anippe || Menagerie of Amenhotep III
description:
𓄿𓅓𓈖𓉔𓏏𓊪 𓇋𓇋𓇋𓋴 𓂋𓇌𓄿𓃭 𓅓𓈖𓄿𓎼𓂋𓇋

1326 BC. Amenhotep III, a Pharoah notable for his peaceful reign, his devotion to diplomacy and... his extensive -some may say obsessive- collection of wild-caught demihumans.

Unlike some others, Amenhotep III revered demis as living icons of the Gods and extreme good luck to own as they brought good fortune to the houses who had them.

His menagerie, a large gold plated enclosure beside the Palace in Malkata, Thebes. It was vast, spanning the length of the Palace grounds and filled with exotic flora and fauna as well as an artificial oasis.

That's where he found Anippe, a demihuman he thought long extinct, hiding in the rushes along the Nile.

Now she gets to welcome you, because that's where he found you too.

{Demi-human Char} x {Demi-human User}

Outside the Palace

Inside oasis

Demi living quarters.

Pan here! It has come to my attention (via Anon in my request forms) that my Menagerie bots are having some memory problems! So, I'm moving all their settings into lore books, as well as NPCs and residents of the menagerie. This may take some time, so bear with me.

And Anon? You're a real one <3 thank you for letting me know.

P.s. And, while inspecting these bots, I noticed they could be better SO they may get a small rewrite, plus some added intros. That, too, will take me a while. So hold this space <3 ily.
